name: Maple Acorn Squash No. 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each squash in half and remove the seeds and fibers.
2. Arrange, cut side up, in a large shallow baking pan.
3. Spoon 2 tablespoons brown sugar into the hollow of each squash.
4. Add 1 tablespoon butter to each squash.
5. Top with 1/4 cup maple syrup.
6. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F or until fork tender.
